hooks.command: python3 -c "import json, sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); path=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2 if any(p in path for p in ['.env', 'package-lock.json', '.git/']) else 0)"

python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load(sys.stdin); cmd=data.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''); blocked=['rm -rf /','drop table','DROP TABLE','shutdown','reboot']; sys.exit(2 if any(b in cmd for b in blocked) else 0)"
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read fp; if echo "$fp" | grep -qE '\.js$'; then npx prettier --write "$fp" 2>/dev/null; fi; }
